Bash(cat > /tmp/check_docker.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

echo "=== DOCKERFILE VALIDATION ==="
echo ""
echo "1. Checking multi-stage build structure..."
grep -E "^FROM|^COPY|^RUN|^EXPOSE|^CMD" /home/eug/dev/projects/my/spring-cloud2/ui/Dockerfile

echo ""
echo "2. Checking dockerfile references correct context..."
grep "node:20-alpine" /home/eug/dev/projects/my/spring-cloud2/ui/Dockerfile && echo "   ✓ Build stage uses Node 20 Alpine"

echo ""
echo "3. Checking nginx config copy..."
grep "COPY nginx.conf" /home/eug/dev/projects/my/spring-cloud2/ui/Dockerfile && echo "   ✓ Nginx config copied"

echo ""
echo "4. Checking port exposure..."
grep "EXPOSE 3000" /home/eug/dev/projects/my/spring-cloud2/ui/Dockerfile && echo "   ✓ Port 3000 exposed"

echo ""
echo "5. Checking docker-compose ui service..."
grep -A 10 "ui:" /home/eug/dev/projects/my/spring-cloud2/docker-compose.yml | grep -E "build|context|dockerfile|ports|depends_on"
EOF
bash /tmp/check_docker.sh)

Bash(cat > /tmp/check_polling.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

echo "=== POLLING INTERVAL VALIDATION ==="
echo ""

echo "Dashboard polling \(should be 5000ms\):"
grep -n "pollingInterval:" /home/eug/dev/projects/my/spring-cloud2/ui/src/features/dashboard/Dashboard.jsx

echo ""
echo "Orders polling \(should be 5000ms\):"
grep -n "pollingInterval:" /home/eug/dev/projects/my/spring-cloud2/ui/src/features/orders/OrdersList.jsx

echo ""
echo "Deliveries polling \(should be 5000ms\):"
grep -n "pollingInterval:" /home/eug/dev/projects/my/spring-cloud2/ui/src/features/deliveries/DeliveriesList.jsx

echo ""
echo "=== ERROR HANDLING VALIDATION ==="
echo ""

echo "StatusBadge color mapping exists:"
grep -E "ORDER_COLORS|DELIVERY_COLORS" /home/eug/dev/projects/my/spring-cloud2/ui/src/components/StatusBadge.jsx | wc -l

echo ""
echo "Status colors defined:"
grep "bg-" /home/eug/dev/projects/my/spring-cloud2/ui/src/components/StatusBadge.jsx | head -8
EOF
bash /tmp/check_polling.sh)

Bash(cat > /tmp/check_api.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

echo "=== API ENDPOINT VALIDATION ==="
echo ""

echo "RTK Query base URL:"
grep "baseUrl" /home/eug/dev/projects/my/spring-cloud2/ui/src/services/api.js

echo ""
echo "All API endpoints defined:"
grep -E "builder\\.\(query|mutation\)" /home/eug/dev/projects/my/spring-cloud2/ui/src/services/api.js | sed 's/.*builder\\.//' | sort -u

echo ""
echo "Query endpoints:"
grep "query: \(\)" /home/eug/dev/projects/my/spring-cloud2/ui/src/services/api.js | grep -oP "'/[^']+'" | sort -u

echo ""
echo "Exported hooks:"
grep "use" /home/eug/dev/projects/my/spring-cloud2/ui/src/services/api.js | grep -oP "use\\w+" | sort -u
EOF
bash /tmp/check_api.sh)

EOF

Bash(cat > /tmp/check_setup.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

echo "=== REDUX & REACT SETUP VERIFICATION ==="
echo ""

echo "1. Store configuration in store.js:"
grep -A 5 "configureStore" /home/eug/dev/projects/my/spring-cloud2/ui/src/app/store.js

echo ""
echo "2. API middleware properly added:"
grep "api.middleware" /home/eug/dev/projects/my/spring-cloud2/ui/src/app/store.js

echo ""
echo "3. Redux Provider in main.jsx:"
grep -E "Provider|store" /home/eug/dev/projects/my/spring-cloud2/ui/src/main.jsx

echo ""
echo "4. StrictMode enabled:"
grep "StrictMode" /home/eug/dev/projects/my/spring-cloud2/ui/src/main.jsx

echo ""
echo "5. React Router BrowserRouter:"
grep "BrowserRouter" /home/eug/dev/projects/my/spring-cloud2/ui/src/App.jsx

echo ""
echo "=== DEPENDENCY VERSIONS ==="
npm list --depth=0 2>/dev/null | grep -E "react|redux|@"
EOF
bash /tmp/check_setup.sh)
